sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92632" key="r(o/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥόζω</orth>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥύζω</foreign>, <sense id="n92632.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">snarl</tr_>, of dogs: metaph. of men, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
